title: Better Rubidium Video Settings Button
description: Better Sodium Video Settings Button Unofficial Forge Port
body:
# Better Rubidium Video Settings  (BRVSB)

[Better Sodium Video Settings](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-sodium-video-settings-button) Forge Port (Unofficial)

This mod changes back the 'Video Options' button to it's original state. To access the Rubidium Video settings go to the Video settings and press Rubidium video settings.
